title: Jpk's Russian Ballistic Shield
description: This texture pack aims to replace the normal Minecraft shield with the Vant-VM Russian ballistic shield
body:
Have you ever wanted to bring modern combat into minecraft? well now you can! 
with the all new Vant-VM Russian ballistic shield! 
This fun texturepack will bring fun to the arena no matter were you go! 

**_NOTE_** Needs optifine or EMF to work! 

(Working on getting custom banner paterns
